name: @aily-project/board-metro_m4_airlift
description: The Adafruit Metro M4 AirLift is based on the ATSAMD51J19 (ARM Cortex-M4 @ 120 MHz) with an onboard ESP32 co-processor for WiFi/BLE, 2 MB QSPI Flash, NeoPixel, microSD slot, and STEMMA QT connector in a classic Metro form factor.
description_en: The Adafruit Metro M4 AirLift is based on the ATSAMD51J19 (ARM Cortex-M4 @ 120 MHz) with an onboard ESP32 co-processor for WiFi/BLE, 2 MB QSPI Flash, NeoPixel, microSD slot, and STEMMA QT connector in a classic Metro form factor.
description_zh_cn: Adafruit Metro M4 AirLift 基于 ATSAMD51J19（ARM Cortex-M4 @ 120 MHz），板载 ESP32 协处理器支持 WiFi/BLE，2 MB QSPI Flash、NeoPixel、microSD 卡槽和 STEMMA QT 连接器，采用经典 Metro 外形。
author: Adafruit
